description: Jarvis built both meeting prep sheet PDFs and pushed them to reMarkable directly instead of dispatching Harper (prep sheets) and Knox (reMarkable upload) in parallel. Same single-threading pattern as err-20260323-003.
correction: Harper owns meeting prep content. Knox owns reMarkable uploads. Jarvis coordinates and dispatches in parallel — does not execute agent-owned work.
systemic_fix: This is the fourth occurrence of Jarvis single-threading agent-owned work. Any meeting prep → Harper. Any reMarkable push → Knox. Any PDF generation is shared infrastructure callable by any agent. Dispatch in parallel.
